build.buildCommand: apt-get update && apt-get install -y libmagic1 && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt && npm install -g javascript-obfuscator && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput

deploy.startCommand: python manage.py migrate --noinput && python create_superuser.py && gunicorn excel_extractor.wsgi --timeout 120 --workers 2
